title: Vein Creepers
description: Adds configurable Creeper variants such as Diamond creepers, two recipe types and a trap block to transform mobs
body:
Adds a bunch of extra creeper variants using a config file and two recipe types

When they explode, if nearby Stone blocks are around (configurable), then these blocks are infused with ores





First lay a trap



Then set items in your trap



After the trap converts the creeper, let it explode around certain blocks such as plain old stone to convert them into ore blocks



See example config and both types of JSON recipes HERE





![Trap your mob to dye it](https://imgur.com/LqDnGJr.gif)




Another example: lapis creeper explosion

https://imgur.com/QyCtWtW

![Explosions turn stone to ore](https://imgur.com/QyCtWtW.gif)

 

 -

Built on FORGE and FLIB https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/flib



 To customize this for a modpack, create a vanilla Datapack, and/or use https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crafttweaker See examples here https://github.com/Lothrazar/VeinCreeper/tree/trunk/1.20/examples
